case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $28,107.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $28,107.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS (H&S 11488.4(A); 1148.5(A)(1)) RE: JOHN HUDSON FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS (H&S 11488.4(A); 1148.5(A)(1)) RE: SHANA HUDSON FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT HUDSON, JOHN
DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY HOHN L. HUDSON FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY SHANAA J. HUDSON FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HUDSON, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $7,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY RANDY SUE POLLOCK ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JOHN L. HUDSON. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $21,107.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: $28,107.00 U.S. CURRENCY, HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 110-396-355 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO 11489 H&S. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
